name: Rhubarb Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the sugar over the rhubarb; set aside.
2. Cream the butter with the brown sugar and beat in the eggs until the mixture is light and fluffy.
3. Mix the flour with the baking soda and baking powder; set aside.
4. Add vinegar to milk and let stand for 10 minutes; set aside.
5. Add flour and milk alternately to the egg mixture, stirring gently after each addition.
6. Stir in vanilla, nuts, and rhubarb into the batter.
7. Pour the batter into two greased 9 x 5 x 3-inch loaf pans.
8. Bake at 325 degrees for 45 to 60 minutes.
9. Turn out onto a rack to cool.
